description_long: This is a three-story residential house with a pink brick exterior and a large, steep, dark hip roof. The facade features large, grid-patterned windows arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front entrance is accentuated by a double-door entryway with potted plants and a paved walkway, while balconies with glass railings are visible on two sides. Mature trees and landscaping elements are present around the building, adding greenery and shade. The structure sits on a wide, paved lot, suggesting urban placement with easy pedestrian access. The overall design is modern with subtle traditional influences, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A three-story pink brick house with a steep dark hip roof, large grid windows, and balconies, surrounded by trees and landscaping on a paved lot.
description_view_0: The main facade shows the double-door entryway, symmetrical windows, and landscaping with two trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: This side view highlights two balconies with glass railings and a large tree partially obscuring the left side.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a garage door, symmetrical window rows, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: This side view features a single balcony, a tree on the right, and a clear view of the hip roof's slope.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with potted plants, no porch, and a paved walkway leading to the entrance.
